summary: The diff shows minimal implementation progress. Only one new file (migration.mo) was added with a placeholder migration function. The main.mo file was modified to import the migration module and reference it, but the diff is truncated. The frontend ConnectBotWizardModal.tsx shows an attempt to address REQ-7 by removing the unsafe fallback and throwing an error instead. No evidence of implementation for most critical security requirements (REQ-1 through REQ-14).

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement stable storage for all backend state maps using stable type declarations or Pre/Post-Upgrade hooks with serialization
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence of stable storage implementation in the truncated main.mo diff. The migration.mo file is a placeholder with no actual migration logic. State maps (userProfiles, trades, licenses, etc.) remain unmodified.
